title: Your Threads posts do not need more tricks
caption: A useful carousel should give people a reason to save it.

slides.title: Start with tension
slides.body: Weak posts announce a topic. Strong posts name the problem the reader already feels.

slides.title: Make one useful point
slides.body: If a post tries to teach three things, none of them lands.

slides.title: Earn the save
slides.body: Likes come from recognition. Saves come from future usefulness.
